subject: two humanoid figures wielding ropes and hooks in an action pose among Zendikar floating rock formations
description: Two humanoid figures occupy the foreground in dynamic combat poses. Both have distinctive pale complexions and white or light-colored hair. The figure on the left swings a rope with a hook above their head; the figure on the right is in a lower, defensive or striking position with a rope extended. Multiple hooks and lines are visible throughout the image. The background shows Zendikar's characteristic floating rock formations under a bright sky. Both figures wear similar dark leather and rope armor.
foreground: two pale humanoid figures wielding ropes and hooks
